name: ADVANCED OXYGEN TECHNOLOGIES INC
summary: Advanced Oxygen Technologies, Inc. (AOXY) is a Delaware holding company with operations through two wholly owned subsidiaries: Anton Nielsen Vojens ApS (ANV), a Danish company that owns and leases commercial real estate in Vojens, Denmark to Circle K Denmark A/S (lease expires 2026), and Sharx Inc./Sharx DK ApS, which distributes Cleaver ApS products for the logistics and cargo industry across Europe, South America, and North America.

products.name: Commercial Real Estate Lease
products.description: ANV leases a commercial real estate facility in Vojens, Denmark to Circle K Denmark A/S under a lease expiring 2026.

products.name: Cleaver ApS Logistics Products
products.description: Sharx DK ApS distributes Cleaver ApS products designed for the logistics and cargo industry in Europe, South America, and North America.

partnerships.description: Non-exclusive distribution agreement for Cleaver ApS logistics and cargo products across Europe, South America, and North America, signed June 30, 2020.
